_meta.description: Roles, staff, contractors, volunteers, advisors. Pairs governance.json (board) for the human layer of the org.

employee-w2.definition: Paid; org controls means + manner of work; receives W-2

contractor-1099.definition: Paid for deliverables; controls own means + manner; receives 1099-NEC if >= $600/year

founder-officer.definition: Founder + family/founding officers; uncompensated until comp policy adopted

board-member.definition: Volunteer governance role; no compensation; expense reimbursement only
board-member.note: Founder + Mom (Treasurer) + Tyler (Secretary) now seated; vice-chair + independent director still open

advisor.definition: Non-governance advisor; no fiduciary duty; quarterly informal touch-ins

volunteer.definition: Time-only contributor; no payment; covered under D&O for governance volunteers

intern.definition: Time-bounded learning role; paid OR unpaid per DOL fact-sheet 71 test

openPositions.title: Vice-Chair · Operations Continuity
openPositions.criticalityRationale: Single highest-risk gap per risk.json R-001; founder incapacitation succession depends on this seat being filled. With Treasurer + Secretary now seated, Vice-Chair becomes the last P0 governance gap.
skillsTarget: Either: nonprofit governance experience OR willingness to learn quickly
openPositions.applicationProcess: Operator-initiated outreach; not publicly recruited until board comp policy adopted

openPositions.title: Independent Director (audit-ready)
openPositions.criticalityRationale: IRS Form 990 governance section + future-audit independence ratio benefit from at least one fully-independent director (no family or business relationship to founder). With Mom seated, related-party concentration is non-trivial.
skillsTarget: No family or business relationship to founder
Some combination of: nonprofit governance, finance/audit, mission-relevant subject matter
Willingness to constructively challenge founder when warranted

currentRoster._operatorNote: Replace displayName with full legal name. Mom can be swapped to Secretary with Tyler as Treasurer if preferred — adjust governance.json officers.current alongside this entry.

currentRoster.form990ScheduleLDisclosure: depends on relationship — operator to confirm
currentRoster._operatorNote: Replace displayName with full legal name. If Tyler is family or has a business relationship with founder, set independent: false and add Schedule L disclosure.

checklist: Read: bylaws, governance.json, mission, last 4 board minutes
DPA if accessing donor or beneficiary data
Scope-of-work document with deliverable + payment milestones
Background check if working with vulnerable populations
Final paycheck (per state law deadline; GA: next regular pay date)
Return of org property + revocation of access
Continued obligations (NDA, IP) acknowledged in writing

performanceReview.framework: Mission-aligned outcomes + role-specific KPIs + qualitative feedback both directions

compensation.philosophy: Pay above-market for cognitive-accessibility-friendly conditions; pay below-market for legacy-tech high-burnout work we don't take on. Net result: market-rate or above for the work we actually do.

transparency.Form990PartVII: 5 highest-paid named publicly (federal requirement) — embraced beyond minimum

benefits.intent: Health insurance, retirement match, mental-health support, flexible schedule, accommodation-by-default
benefits.phase: available when first W-2 employee hired; SHOP marketplace or PEO partnership likely path

diversityAndInclusion.principle: Hire for skill-balanced lived-experience over pedigree. AuDHD-first design extends to hiring: accommodate executive-function variance in process; never demand 'culture fit' that excludes neurodivergence.

tracking.demographicData: voluntary self-disclosure only; aggregated for Form 990 disclosure when required

accessibilityCommitments: Job descriptions reviewed for unnecessary requirements (degree-required-when-not-needed, etc.)
Interview processes accommodate sensory + cognitive variance
Async-first communication; synchronous meetings limited and bounded
